title: Assistant Store Manager - Star Bazaar Global Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Star Bazaar Global Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Star Bazaar Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Bazaar Global Group:
Star Bazaar Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
